case_title: FIRST DEPOSIT NATIONAL BANK vs. ARTIGAS, RUBEN E.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST DEPOSIT NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ARTIGAS, RUBEN E.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST DEPOSIT NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARTIGAS, RUBEN E. $4,280.31 PRINCIPAL, $4,126.09 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,429.40, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE NUMBER: 039644 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
